name: code1
synccode: <div>cdir=`pwd`</div><div>pfr $1.drawio drawio.ohm drawio.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - styleexpander.ohm styleexpander.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - attributeelider.ohm attributeelider.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - emitFactbase.ohm emitFactbase.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | sort&nbsp;<span>&gt;15.pl</span></div><div><span>echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span></div>

name: code2
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## create rect fact for every vertex that is not an edge/ellipse/text</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## sequence.drawio file contains vertexes, and marks all edge and ellipse (and text)</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## but does not mark rectangles (the default)</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## this pass finds the defaults and creates explicit rect(...) facts</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(5).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(rects).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'printRects.' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'halt.' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &gt; 16.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span></font></p><div><br></div>

name: code3
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px"># convert fb.pl to JSON form</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'use_module(library(http/json))' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(fb).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(component).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(names).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(code).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(jsoncomponent).'\</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'allc.'\</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'halt.'</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>

name: code4
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal"><span class="s1"><font>read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</font></span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -g 'consult(fb).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(boundingBoxes).' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px"><font>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'printBB.' \</font></span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px"><font>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'halt.' \</font></span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px"><font>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &gt;temp2.pl</font></span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span><font>echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</font></span><br></p>

name: code5
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q\</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">&nbsp; -g 'consult(fb).' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">&nbsp; -g 'consult(onSameDiagram).' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; -g 'consult(contain1).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; -g 'allContains1.'\</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; -g 'halt.' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">| ./augment-fb.bash&nbsp;</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>

name: code6
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">cat 15.pl 16.pl &gt;fb.pl</p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</p>

name: code7
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px"># augment the factbase (fb.pl) after every inferencing step</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cat fb.pl temp2.pl | sort &gt;temp3.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">mv temp3.pl fb.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span>echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p>

name: code8
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo "baton=/$baton/" 1&gt;&amp;2</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo end 1&gt;&amp;2</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"># no output</span></p>

name: code9
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(fb).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(onSameDiagram).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'consult(contain2).' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'printAllDeepContains.' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">&nbsp; &nbsp; -g 'halt.' \</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">&nbsp; | ./augment-fb.bash&nbsp;</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>
